title:
AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MANTA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF
SIASI, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO SUSULAN JIMLANI ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1391 / 67 OG No. 38, 7448 (September 20, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6211, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF MANTA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF

SIASI, PROVINCE OF SULU, TO SUSULAN JIMLANI ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Manta Elementary School in the Municipality of Siasi, Province of Sulu, is changed to Susulan Jimlani Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
